answers.contents: 这么好的帖子，被尼德兰那个婊子养的秒水了，就因为程博士支持川普

discussions.content: 這平台真的越來越不行

你好，这个帖子一开始就是在水区的，因为楼主在灰名单里。
Don't hate, we live in a diverse world, where shall be all rainbows and love!

You see, we are not the same but all equal. We're Black, White, Asian, Hispanic and others. We're homosexual, heterosexual, asexual, pansexual and others. We're men, women, nonbinary, transgender and others.
Why not just celebrate our differences and peacefully speak and communicate?
